text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 273 

SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

LABEL: Submitting State Entity Code 

DESCRIPTION: The ANSI Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) numeric state code for the U.S. state, 
territory, or the District of Columbia that has submitted the data. 

SHORT NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

LONG NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): All demographic and eligibility
